title: Microsoft Mb-330 Training
description:
Microsoft MB-330 training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Microsoft MB-330 training as per your pace.

Microsoft MB-330 course is designed for professionals to build foundation in Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management application knowledge. This course will cover the most important characteristics and functionalities needed by Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management functional consultant which comprises the product information and how to construct, generate, and handle your product and inventory. It also teaches about supply chain management configuration and processing. The transportation management features, and the warehouse management features,Quality management and quality control functionalities, Master planning configuration and processing etc.This Microsoft course is specifically designed for the Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management functional consultant. The Dynamics 365 Supply Chain Management functional consultant is the main resource that designs and customizes apps to meet the requirements for an end user.The functional consultant investigates business requirements and translates those requirements into fully realized business processes and solutions that implement industry-recommended practices.Any size of organizations use Dynamics 365 for Finance and Operations to automate and streamline all supply chain, by modernizing business logistics, delivering timely customer response, getting ahead with predictive insights, streamlining procurement, and unifying processes from sales to fulfillment.

Complete Customization of Microsoft MB-330 training’s course content is possible for Individual students and for Corporate.  Microsoft MB-330 online training is available for individuals and for corporate we may arrange the classroom as well. For more information on Microsoft MB-330 training do connect us.
